2026-3-1.title: Plowing Kills the Network - Carousel
2026-3-1.description: Soil Biology - Every time you plow, you're killing the network that feeds your crops for free.

2026-3-4.title: The Weed They Never Stopped Planting - Carousel
2026-3-4.description: Plant Profile - The government declared it a weed. Indigenous farmers never stopped planting it.

2026-3-8.title: Mining Left, Forest Came Back - Carousel
2026-3-8.description: Community Story - Mining companies left. The farmers stayed. Thirty years later, the forest came back.

2026-3-11.title: Ifugao Water Computer - Carousel
2026-3-11.description: Indigenous Knowledge - The Ifugao didn't build rice terraces. They built a gravity-powered water computer.

2026-3-15.title: Landslide-Stopping Grass - Carousel
2026-3-15.description: Water Management - This grass can stop a landslide, filter dirty water, and survive being burned to the ground.

2026-3-18.title: Banana-Ripening Tree - Carousel
2026-3-18.description: Plant Profile - Filipinos use this tree to ripen bananas. It could replace their entire fertilizer budget.
